compiled_state.title: record-review.sh: ARTIFACTS_DIR env var ignored — must use WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
record-review.sh calls get_artifacts_dir() from deps.sh, which computes the artifacts path from the repo root SHA hash (/tmp/workflow-plugin-<hash>/). It does NOT read the ARTIFACTS_DIR env var set by the caller. To override the path, callers must use WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR, not ARTIFACTS_DIR.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Set ARTIFACTS_DIR=/some/path and run record-review.sh
2. Script writes to /tmp/workflow-plugin-<hash>/ instead, ignoring ARTIFACTS_DIR

## Expected
ARTIFACTS_DIR should be honored, OR the override var should be documented clearly near where ARTIFACTS_DIR is set in COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md

## Actual
Callers set ARTIFACTS_DIR (natural name), but the script silently uses a different computed path, causing 'reviewer-findings.json not found' errors.

## Workaround
Use WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR=<path> instead of ARTIFACTS_DIR.

comments.body: Classification: mechanical. Applied targeted text fix. Running Gate 2a next.
comments.author: Test
